claims.text: Clever lazy people rank higher in capability and danger than stupid energetic people. Laziness correlates with ingenuity and creative problem-solving because lazy people prefer to sit and think about easier solutions rather than solve problems through brute force.
claims.speaker: Unknown speaker
conditions: Comparative evaluation framework (clever vs. stupid; lazy vs. energetic)
claims.mechanism: Laziness incentivizes creative problem-solving via thinking rather than brute force effort; this cognitive approach correlates with ingenuity.
bounded_by: Limited to the four-quadrant ranking (stupid energetic, stupid lazy, clever energetic, clever lazy)
Does not establish absolute performance levels
